data.name: BullTales 🦬
data.detailed_description:
破碎的心，超自然的嚮導：

你能從背叛中崛起，成為註定要成為的阿爾法嗎？

故事講述了一個心碎的大學生，當他的女友簡與校園四分衛出軌時，他的世界崩塌了。迪倫，曾經自信而雄心勃勃，發現自己被孤立和羞辱，惡意謠言摧毀了他的聲譽。

就在絕望威脅要完全吞噬他的時候，來自他損壞手機的神秘聲音提供了一個不太可能的聯盟。

公牛電話，一個有著自己議程的超自然實體，承諾將我們的主角從受害者轉變為勝利者。但這種力量是有代價的——他必須通過一系列越來越大膽的遭遇來證明自己的價值...

★ 分支後果 ★

每個選擇都會在6個引人入勝的劇集中塑造你的轉變。建立真正的聯繫或追求純粹的征服——你的決定決定了你將實現多個結局中的哪一個。

★ 複雜角色 ★

與多樣化的女性角色互動，每個人都有自己的動機、慾望和背景故事。從大學生到職業女性，每段關係都提供獨特的挑戰和獎勵。

★ 驚艷視覺效果 ★

體驗超過24個精心製作的親密場景，配有流暢的逐幀動畫。每次相遇都通過捕捉激情和情感的詳細藝術作品栩栩如生。

data.short_description: You're now the bull 🦬. Step into a provocative realm of cuckold/NTR reimagined with a fresh twist. Get ready to unleash your desire, have a blast, and dominate the scene with undeniable allure.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later (x64)
  • 處理器: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOs 10.10 or later
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04.7 or later
  • 處理器: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible

data.name: BullTales 🦬
data.detailed_description:
A Shattered Heart, A Supernatural Guide:

Can You Rise From Betrayal to Become the Alpha You Were Meant to Be?

The story follows a heartbroken college student whose world crumbles when his girlfriend Jane cheats on him with the campus quarterback. Dylan, once confident and ambitious, finds himself isolated and humiliated as malicious rumors destroy his reputation.

Just when despair threatens to consume him completely, a mysterious voice from his damaged phone offers an unlikely alliance.

The Bull Phone, a supernatural entity with its own agenda, promises to transform our protagonist from victim to victor. But this power comes with a price - he must prove himself worthy through a series of increasingly bold encounters...

★ Branching Consequences ★

Every choice shapes your transformation across 6 compelling episodes. Build genuine connections or pursue pure conquest - your decisions determine which of multiple endings you'll achieve.

★ Complex Characters ★

Engage with a diverse cast of women, each with their own motivations, desires, and backstories. From college students to professional women, each relationship offers unique challenges and rewards.

★ Stunning Visuals ★

Experience over 24 meticulously crafted intimate scenes with fluid frame-by-frame animation. Each encounter is brought to life through detailed artwork that captures both passion and emotion.
